description: Create comprehensive evidence figure showing the misannotation of AprA as SDH
code:
import requests
import numpy as np

# Now let's create a comprehensive visualization showing the evidence
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))
fig.suptitle('Evidence: Q72DT2 (aprA) is APS Reductase, NOT Succinate Dehydrogenase', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel A: Domain architecture comparison
ax = axes[0, 0]
ax.set_title('A. Domain Architecture', fontweight='bold')

proteins = [
    ('Q72DT2\n(DvH AprA)\n664 aa', [
        (15/664, 279/664, 'FAD_binding_2\n(PF00890)', '#2196F3'),
        (280/664, 653/664, 'SDH/FRD catalytic\n(SSF56425)', '#4CAF50'),
    ], 'APS Reductase\nEC 1.8.99.2'),
    ('P0AC41\n(Ec SdhA)\n588 aa', [
        (14/588, 52/588, 'FAD_binding_2', '#2196F3'),
        (53/588, 300/588, 'SDH/FRD catalytic', '#4CAF50'),
        (301/588, 588/588, 'C-terminal', '#FF9800'),
    ], 'Succinate DH\nEC 1.3.5.1'),
    ('P00363\n(Ec FrdA)\n602 aa', [
        (12/602, 52/602, 'FAD_binding_2', '#2196F3'),
        (53/602, 310/602, 'SDH/FRD catalytic', '#4CAF50'),
        (311/602, 602/602, 'C-terminal', '#FF9800'),
    ], 'Fumarate Red.\nEC 1.3.5.1'),
]

for i, (label, domains, ec_label) in enumerate(proteins):
    y = 2 - i
    # Draw protein bar
    ax.barh(y, 1.0, height=0.3, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
    # Draw domains
    for start, end, name, color in domains:
        ax.barh(y, end-start, left=start, height=0.3, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5, alpha=0.8)
    ax.text(-0.05, y, label, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8)
    ax.text(1.05, y, ec_label, ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')

ax.set_xlim(-0.4, 1.5)
ax.set_ylim(-0.5, 3)
ax.set_xlabel('Relative position')
ax.set_yticks([])

# Panel B: Key discriminating features table
ax = axes[0, 1]
ax.set_title('B. Key Discriminating Features', fontweight='bold')
ax.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'AprA (Q72DT2)', 'SdhA'],
    ['EC Number', '1.8.99.2', '1.3.5.1'],
    ['Reaction', 'APS → sulfite + AMP', 'Succinate → fumarate'],
    ['Substrate', 'Sulfur compound', 'C4 dicarboxylate'],
    ['FAD binding', 'NON-COVALENT', 'COVALENT (His)'],
    ['Cov. FAD His', 'ABSENT', 'His45 (8α-FAD)'],
    ['InterPro family', 'IPR011803 (AprA)', 'IPR030664 (shared)'],
    ['KEGG Pathway', 'Sulfur metabolism', 'TCA cycle'],
    ['Arg317 (catalytic)', 'PRESENT', 'N/A'],
]

table = ax.table(cellText=table_data, loc='center', cellLoc='center', 
                 colWidths=[0.3, 0.35, 0.35])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

# Color header row
for j in range(3):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#34495e')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Color mismatches in red
for i in range(1, 9):
    table[i, 1].set_facecolor('#e8f5e9')  # green for AprA (correct)
    table[i, 2].set_facecolor('#ffebee')  # red for SdhA (wrong assignment)

# Panel C: FAD-binding motif alignment
ax = axes[1, 0]
ax.set_title('C. FAD-Binding Region Alignment', fontweight='bold')
ax.axis('off')

# Show the critical alignment
alignment_text = """GxGxxG motif and covalent FAD histidine region:

DvH AprA:  ....VGGGMGACGTAFEAVRWADKYAPELKILLIDKASLE...
Af  AprA:  ...LIIGGGFSGCGAAYEAAYWAKVGAEERIIMLIDKDALE...
Ec  SdhA:  ...VVIGAGGAGMRAALQISQSGQTCALLSKVFPTRSHTVSAQ...
Ec  FrdA:  ...VIVGAGGAGLRAAIAAAQANPNAKIALISKVYPMRSHTVAA...
                 ***.*.     *              *          
                GxGxxG                    ^
                motif                 Covalent FAD His
                                     (SHT motif)
                                     PRESENT in SdhA/FrdA
                                     ABSENT in AprA!
"""
ax.text(0.05, 0.95, alignment_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8, 
        fontfamily='monospace', verticalalignment='top',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

# Panel D: Verdict
ax = axes[1, 1]
ax.set_title('D. Verdict', fontweight='bold')
ax.axis('off')

verdict_text = """VERDICT: WRONG SUBFAMILY (MIS-PLACED)

Failure Mode #3: Within-superfamily mis-placement

The PANTHER family PTHR11632 encompasses an FAD-dependent
oxidoreductase superfamily containing three functionally
distinct subfamilies:
  • SdhA - Succinate dehydrogenase (EC 1.3.5.1)
  • FrdA - Fumarate reductase (EC 1.3.5.1) 
  • AprA - APS reductase (EC 1.8.99.2) ← Q72DT2

TreeGrafter placed Q72DT2 in the SdhA subfamily
(PTHR11632:SF51) and propagated GO:0000104
(succinate dehydrogenase activity).

CORRECT TERM: GO:0009973
  adenylyl-sulfate reductase activity

ACTION: REPLACE with GO:0009973
"""

ax.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=9, 
        verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#ffcdd2', alpha=0.9))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: evidence_summary.png")
